top_signals.title: A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Allison Minor wrote, “Solving the Houthi Threat to Freedom of Navigation,” where she argued the international response to Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea has so far been inadequate and proposed a U.N.-led solution. Two years later, with global attention once again focused on maritime shipping activity, we asked Allison to review her arguments. Image: Petty Officer 1st Class Jonathan Word via DVIDSWhen you wrote about the Houthi threat in 2024, the activities in the Red Sea commanded high global attention. Two years on, that attention has largely shifted to the Strait of Hormuz. What has been

The post A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US strikes again after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed
top_signals.summary: IRGC hits commercial ship transiting through waterway, with Centcom saying a crew member was missing from vessel

top_signals.title: Mogotes says drilling expands Andes copper-gold target
top_signals.summary: Mogotes Metals expands its Albor copper-gold discovery at Filo Sur with near-surface drill results in the prolific Vicuña district.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ex-US Navy commander quits NovaRed copper firm over Noem hire
top_signals.summary: Phil Ehr resigns from NovaRed Mining's advisory board after hiring ex-DHS chief Kristi Noem, drawing scrutiny.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
top_signals.summary: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
top_signals.summary: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: IDEX finds tungsten in Idaho copper drilling
top_signals.summary: IDEX Metals has added a critical-metals angle to the Kismet target at its Freeze copper project in Idaho.
